name: tabs
title: Tabs
description: Underline tabs with a spring-sliding caramel ink bar. Controlled: pass `value` + `onChange`.

files.content:
Underline tabs with a spring-sliding caramel ink bar. Controlled: pass `value` + `onChange`.

```jsx
<Tabs value={tab} onChange={setTab} items={[
  { id: 'overview', label: 'Overview', icon: 'layout-dashboard' },
  { id: 'members', label: 'Members', icon: 'users', count: 12 },
]} />
```
